title: Connecticut Disability Claims Examiner Rates (CT DAS P-3B pay plans, eff 2025-07-01)
description: Connecticut DDS disability adjudication series with verified Salary Group assignments and step-grid dollar figures: Disability Claims Examiner Assistant (7102EB, EB 21, $65,190-$84,765), Disability Claims Examiner (7103EH, EH 23, $80,168-$106,733), Disability Claims Specialist (7104EQ, EQ 25, $88,127-$118,740), and Disability Claims Supervisor (7105EH, EH 28, $101,964-$135,709). Salary Group assignments are from the official CT DAS JobAps class specs; dollar grids are from the official CT DAS P-3B EB/EH/EQ pay plans (eff 2025-07-01), extracted from the PDFs locally with pypdf. Administering agency is the CT Dept of Aging and Disability Services, Bureau of Disability Determination Services.

columns.name: classes.<class>.salary_group
columns.description: CT Salary Group (e.g. EH 23), verified from the JobAps class spec.

columns.name: classes.<class>.annual_min
columns.description: Annual Step 1 (minimum) for the Salary Group.

columns.name: classes.<class>.annual_max
columns.description: Annual top step (maximum) for the Salary Group.

columns.name: classes.<class>.step_grid_annual
columns.description: Full annual step grid (array) from the P-3B pay plan.

source.publisher: Connecticut Department of Administrative Services (DAS); CT Dept of Aging and Disability Services (ADS) Bureau of Disability Determination Services
source.title: CT DAS JobAps class specs + P-3B EB/EH/EQ Pay Plans, effective 2025-07-01

update_cadence: annual (CT DAS salary plans, July 1 effective)
notes: Authoritative: Salary Group assignments (7102EB->EB 21, 7103EH->EH 23, 7104EQ->EQ 25, 7105EH->EH 28) verified from official CT DAS JobAps class specs, and the step-grid dollars from the official CT DAS P-3B EB/EH/EQ pay plans (eff 2025-07-01). Dollar figures were extracted from the downloaded PDFs locally with pypdf because the Firecrawl markdown/table conversion dropped middle groups and the page-query mode hallucinated EQ-25 (duplicated EQ-22) — both caught and rejected. Corrections to prior card: agency is ADS Bureau of Disability Determination Services (not DSS); plan classification is P-3B (not P-2); union appears to be CSEA SEIU Local 2001 (not AFSCME 714) — union identity not deeply re-verified (cba_union_identity_verified false), but it does not affect the pay figures.
